weakest_point: The thesis's claim that the proposed V3 architecture achieves its stated performance objectives (specifically, target_brier_skill_score consistently exceeding 0.20) was directly falsified by its own Level 3 Quantitative Unit Test, where the final rolling BSS was -0.045. This demonstrates a fundamental failure of the architecture, as implemented, to deliver on its primary promise, rendering much of the anti-gaming and differentiability enforcement moot if the system still cannot produce accurate predictions.
